title: Mr Crimbo Frosted Christmas Wreath Pine Cones Snowberries Traditional Green 60cm
features: Lifelike pine, larch and evergreen branches for a woodland look
Large clusters of snowberries and mixed pine cones
Artificial snow and ice crystals enhance the winter frost vibe
60cm (24") is perfect for your front door
Suitable for indoor and outdoor use in a sheltered position
description: Description: Welcome your festive guests to a winter wonderland with this enchanting Frosted Christmas Wreath. This 60cm (24") wreath captures the essence of a forest in winter, featuring lifelike green pine, larch, and evergreen branches adorned with a delicate dusting of snow and ice crystals. Abundant clusters of white snowberries and mixed pine cones adorn the lifelike foliage, evoking the spirit of a winter forest. Perfect for decorating your front door or porch. Features: Lifelike pine, larch, and evergreen branches for a woodland ambience Large clusters of snowberries and mixed pine cones create a winter forest atmosphere Artificial snow and ice crystals enhance the frosty winter vibe Mixed lush foliage provides a fuller look Ideal 60cm (24") size for front door adornment Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use Specifications: Diameter: 60cm (24"), including foliage Depth: 15cm (6") including foliage Foliage Type: PE needle tips, mixed artificial leaves Decoration: 4 snowberry clusters, ten mixed pine cones Base material: Green coated wire double frame Hanging options: Use a sturdy over-door hook (hook not included) Intended Use: Suitable for indoor use and outdoors in a sheltered position Additional Information: Create a holiday winter wonderland greeting with this stunning Pine and Snowberry Forest Christmas Wreath. Imagine the ambience of a snow-covered log cabin in the mountains, thanks to the lifelike forest foliage. If you adore this lifelike Frosted Christmas Wreath, don't miss out on the matching 2.7m Frosted Christmas Garland.
